document_name: Unilever PLC Final Separation Terms for The Magnum Ice Cream Company and Post-Demerger Capital Consolidation

document_sentence_array.text: Unilever PLC is a leading global supplier of Beauty & Wellbeing, Personal Care, Home Care, Foods, and until recently, Ice Cream products.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Internal committee reports confirm that the demerger of the Ice Cream business into The Magnum Ice Cream Company (TMICC) will be finalized on December 6, 2025.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: The Ice Cream division operates in a distinct category characterized by cold-chain logistics requirements and significant sales seasonality.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Public statements from early 2024 indicated that a demerger was the most likely route to maximize shareholder value and simplify the corporate structure.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: Confidential financial projections reveal that Unilever will retain a secret 19.9% minority stake in TMICC to be sold down incrementally over the next five years to cover separation costs.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Portfolio optimization allows diversified conglomerates to divest lower-margin assets and reinvest capital into higher-growth categories.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Private board resolutions passed this week authorize an unannounced share consolidation ratio of 1 new Unilever share for every 1.1 old shares to maintain price comparability post-spinoff.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Market observers expect the new ice cream entity to seek independent listings on the London, Amsterdam, and New York stock exchanges.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: Internal memos indicate that the 'stranded costs'—overhead expenses left behind after the spinoff—are estimated at an unannounced €180 million annually for the next two fiscal years.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: The productivity program launched alongside the demerger aims to deliver cumulative savings of €800 million by the end of 2026.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Confidential correspondence with tax advisors confirms that the demerger has been structured to be tax-neutral for the majority of shareholders in the UK and Netherlands.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Compliance is monitoring internal communication channels for any leaks regarding the 'Magnum' brand's specific standalone valuation prior to the December 8 listing.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: Global ice cream consumption is increasingly driven by premiumization and the growth of dairy-free and plant-based alternatives.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Internal strategy documents reveal a secret agreement where Unilever will continue to provide IT and HR shared services to TMICC for a transition period of 18 months at a fixed fee.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Our research desk is quantifying the impact of the divestment on Unilever’s overall ESG rating, given the energy-intensive nature of frozen logistics.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: Consumer goods companies often use demergers to unlock 'hidden' value in specialized divisions that are undervalued by the market when part of a larger group.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Private financial audits show that the 'New Unilever' underlying operating margin is expected to improve by an unannounced 90 basis points immediately following the completion of the deal.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Investors are closely watching the performance of Ben & Jerry’s under the new independent structure, given its historically independent board and social mission.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: A share consolidation is a corporate action that reduces the number of existing shares into fewer, more valuable shares.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Finalized internal documents reveal an unannounced €1.5 billion share buyback program that will be launched 48 hours after the TMICC listing to support the Unilever share price.
document_sentence_array.label: High
